features: User Authentication: Sign up, log in, and password recovery options.
User Profiles: Allow multiple profiles under one account with personalized recommendations.
Content Library: Categorized movie and TV show listings with genres, ratings, and descriptions.
Search Functionality: Advanced search with filters for genre, release year, and popularity.
Watchlist: Users can add movies and shows to a personal watchlist for easy access.
Recommendations Engine: Personalized recommendations based on viewing history and ratings.
Playback Controls: Play, pause, rewind, fast forward, and volume control during streaming.
Offline Viewing: Option to download selected content for offline viewing.
Subtitles and Audio Options: Multiple language subtitles and audio tracks for accessibility.
User Ratings and Reviews: Users can rate and review content, with a system to report inappropriate content.
Interactive UI: Smooth transitions between pages, hover effects on clickable items, and animated loading indicators.
Responsive Design: Optimized for desktop, tablet, and mobile devices with adaptive layouts.
Empty States: Friendly messages when no content is available in a category or watchlist.
Loading States: Skeleton screens or spinners while content is being fetched.
Error Handling: User-friendly error messages for failed logins, streaming issues, or content not found.
Multi-page Navigation: Clear navigation bar with links to Home, Browse, My List, and Account settings.
Content Details Page: In-depth view of each movie/show with trailers, cast info, and related content.
Parental Controls: Options to restrict content based on ratings for child profiles.
Social Sharing: Ability to share favorite movies/shows on social media platforms.
Notifications: Alerts for new releases, recommendations, and updates on watchlist items.
Live Chat Support: In-app chat feature for customer support with FAQs and troubleshooting.
Analytics Dashboard: Admin interface to track user engagement, popular content, and performance metrics.
Edge Cases Handling: Graceful handling of expired subscriptions, content removal, and network issues.
